hero.title: Welcome to my Portfolio
hero.subtitle: Get to know me a bit, here you will find my projects, my way of thinking and much more.

quotes.text: "We are not living in an era of changes, we are living a change of era."
quotes.author: Jose Pino

quotes.text: "Perhaps we have to separate, for the first time in history, what we do from what we are."
quotes.author: Jose Pino

quotes.text: "Some people don't like change, but you need to embrace change if the alternative is disaster."
quotes.author: Elon Musk

quotes.text: "Talk is cheap. Show me the code."
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: "The advance of technology is based on making it fit in so that you don't really even notice it."
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.text: "Imagination is more important than knowledge. Knowledge is limited."
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: "The biggest risk is not taking any risk. In a world that is changing really quickly, the only strategy that is guaranteed to fail is not taking risks."
quotes.author: Mark Zuckerberg
